ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayat.english: Hath there come upon man (ever) any period of time in which he was a thing unremembered?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayat.english: Lo! We create man from a drop of thickened fluid to test him; so We make him hearing, knowing.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
ayat.english: Lo! We have shown him the way, whether he be grateful or disbelieving.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
ayat.english: Lo! We have prepared for disbelievers manacles and carcans and a raging fire.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayat.english: Lo! the righteous shall drink of a cup whereof the mixture is of Kafur,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayat.english: A spring wherefrom the slaves of Allah drink, making it gush forth abundantly,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayat.english: (Because) they perform the vow and fear a day whereof the evil is wide-spreading,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
ayat.english: And feed with food the needy wretch, the orphan and the prisoner, for love of Him,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayat.english: (Saying): We feed you, for the sake of Allah only. We wish for no reward nor thanks from you;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayat.english: Lo! we fear from our Lord a day of frowning and of fate.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
ayat.english: Therefor Allah hath warded off from them the evil of that day, and hath made them find brightness and joy;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
ayat.english: And hath awarded them for all that they endured, a Garden and silk attire;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
ayat.english: Reclining therein upon couches, they will find there neither (heat of) a sun nor bitter cold.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
ayat.english: The shade thereof is close upon them and the clustered fruits thereof bow down.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
ayat.english: Goblets of silver are brought round for them, and beakers (as) of glass

ayat.arabic_uthmani: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
ayat.english: (Bright as) glass but (made) of silver, which they (themselves) have measured to the measure (of their deeds).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayat.english: There are they watered with a cup whereof the mixture is of Zanjabil,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
ayat.english: (The water of) a spring therein, named Salsabil.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayat.english: There wait on them immortal youths, whom, when thou seest, thou wouldst take for scattered pearls.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayat.english: When thou seest, thou wilt see there bliss and high estate.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayat.english: Their raiment will be fine green silk and gold embroidery. Bracelets of silver will they wear. Their Lord will slake their thirst with a pure drink.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
ayat.english: (And it will be said unto them): Lo! this is a reward for you. Your endeavour (upon earth) hath found acceptance.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
ayat.english: Lo! We, even We, have revealed unto thee the Qur'an, a revelation;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
ayat.english: So submit patiently to thy Lord's command, and obey not of them any guilty one or disbeliever.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
ayat.english: Remember the name of thy Lord at morn and evening.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
ayat.english: And worship Him (a portion) of the night. And glorify Him through the livelong night.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
ayat.english: Lo! these love fleeting life, and put behind them (the remembrance of) a grievous day.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayat.english: We, even We, created them, and strengthened their frame. And when We will, We can replace them, bringing others like them in their stead.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayat.english: Lo! this is an Admonishment, that whosoever will may choose a way unto his Lord.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayat.english: Yet ye will not, unless Allah willeth. Lo! Allah is Knower, Wise.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
ayat.english: He maketh whom He will to enter His mercy, and for evil-doers hath prepared a painful doom.
